properties.Test Case: Bloom Enterprise feature. Test out Bulk Upload. Ensure a bookshelf is required. Try multiple uploads to different bookshelves. Ensure correct xmatter is applied, cf. BL-10347 for Kyrgyz project.
properties.Steps: Bloom Enterprise feature. Test out Bulk Upload. Ensure a bookshelf is required. Try multiple uploads to different bookshelves. Ensure correct xmatter is applied, cf. BL-10347 for Kyrgyz project.

properties.Test Case: Set the bookshelf to none and try a bulk upload. Should get a message like this. (JT 6.3: no longer a problem report dialog, the message just appears in the "Upload Progress" area. Note: the upload collection command is found in the pull-down on the right of the "upload book" button.)
properties.Steps: - Set the bookshelf to none and try a bulk upload. Should get a message like this. (JT 6.3: no longer a problem report dialog, the message just appears in the "Upload Progress" area. Note: the upload collection command is found in the pull-down on the right of the "upload book" button.)

properties.Test Case: Collision ID Dialogue: Upload a book to Blorg then upload again. Should get an ID collision dialogue. Test both options.
properties.Steps: Collision ID Dialogue: Upload a book to Blorg then upload again. Should get an ID collision dialogue. Test both options.

properties.Test Case: change the front cover image of above book and re-upload. The thumbnail on the right-hand side should be the current one.
